title: Generate for loop makes unsigned var leading to false INFINITELOOP

features.name: generate-for with genvar iterating to create localparam values passed to submodule
features.description: Code should include a generate-for loop using genvar where localparam values derived from genvar iteration are passed to submodule instances

features.name: downward for loop with int variable compared against unsigned module parameter
features.description: Code should include a downward for loop where a signed int variable is compared against a module parameter bound to an unsigned generate-scope value

features.name: localparam derived from genvar bound to submodule parameter
features.description: Code should include a localparam whose value is derived from a genvar, passed as a module parameter, and used in a loop condition comparison
